topic: Stage Transaction Mapping and Amount Editability
summary: This topic covers how to link specific admission heads to different stages of the admission process and configure whether the amount for these heads can be modified during payment collection.
steps: Select and 'View' the desired admission stage (e.g., 'Lead Stage').
Go to the 'Transactions' tab within the stage details.
Ensure the transaction option is enabled for the stage.
Select the relevant 'Course' for which the transaction applies.
Select the 'Head' (e.g., 'Registration Fees') to be collected at this stage.
Enter the default 'Amount' for the selected head.
Toggle the 'Editable' switch: ON to allow amount modification during collection, OFF to fix the amount.
Use the 'Copy Course Head' option to quickly apply the same mapping to other courses.
business_rules: If 'Editable' is ON, users can change the amount collected for that head during the transaction.
If 'Editable' is OFF, the amount is fixed as configured and cannot be changed during collection.
Multiple admission heads can be mapped to a single stage.
Different heads can be mapped to different stages based on the admission workflow.
important_notes: The decision to make an amount editable or fixed should align with the institution's payment policies.
The 'Copy Course Head' feature streamlines the process of mapping transactions across multiple courses.
questions: How do I link an admission fee to a specific stage?
Can I make the registration fee amount editable during collection?
What is the purpose of the 'Editable' setting in transaction mapping?
How do I add multiple transaction heads to a single admission stage?
